title: Unable to click on Contact name in a mirrored column and see contact info
excerpt: I am suddenly unable to click on a contact name on my board (from a connected/mirrored column) and see a pop up window with all of the contact information.  Pop-ups are enable on my browser.  Did something change?

posts.author: Heidiw33 (Heidi Brown)
posts.cookedHtml: I am suddenly unable to click on a contact name on my board (from a connected/mirrored column) and see a pop up window with all of the contact information. Pop-ups are enable on my browser. Did something change?
